metadata.description: Hispanic-Serving Institutions database for AI Readiness Atlas

institutions.name: The University of Texas at El Paso
institutions.carnegie_classification: R1: Doctoral Universities – Very High Research Activity
ai_highlights: Home to CAHSI national headquarters and the Institute for Applied AI Innovation (AAII)
Leads NSF CUE-M grant (#2434338) embedding ethical reasoning across CS curricula at CAHSI institutions
Developed AI Readiness Atlas platform for 500+ HACU member institutions

ai_readiness.notes: Home of CAHSI and the Institute for Applied AI Innovation. Pioneering embedded ethics initiative.

institutions.name: Florida International University
institutions.carnegie_classification: R1: Doctoral Universities – Very High Research Activity
ai_highlights: Knight Foundation School of Computing hosts cutting-edge AI/ML research labs
Published comprehensive faculty AI policy framework for all courses
NSF-funded research in natural language processing and computer vision

ai_readiness.notes: Knight Foundation School of Computing and Information Sciences. Strong AI research programs.

institutions.name: New Mexico State University
institutions.carnegie_classification: R1: Doctoral Universities – Very High Research Activity
ai_highlights: Computing Research Laboratory conducts federally funded NLP and AI research
Strong CAHSI integration with dedicated chapter for broadening participation
Active in AI ethics research through interdisciplinary collaborations

ai_readiness.notes: Strong computing program with CAHSI integration. Active in AI ethics research.

institutions.name: California State University, Dominguez Hills
institutions.carnegie_classification: Master's Colleges & Universities: Larger Programs
ai_highlights: Serves as CAHSI West Region Lead coordinating computing education across California
Active in computing education initiatives bridging community colleges to 4-year programs
Developing AI literacy modules for non-CS majors

ai_readiness.notes: CAHSI West Region Lead. Active in computing education initiatives.

institutions.name: Texas A&M University-Corpus Christi
institutions.carnegie_classification: R2: Doctoral Universities – High Research Activity
ai_highlights: Island University developing coastal AI applications for environmental monitoring
CAHSI founding member with strong computing sciences department
Growing data science curriculum with industry partnerships

ai_readiness.notes: Island University with growing computing programs.

institutions.name: University of Houston-Downtown
institutions.carnegie_classification: Master's Colleges & Universities: Larger Programs
ai_highlights: Urban university bringing AI education to Houston's diverse workforce
CAHSI founding member bridging access gaps in computing education
Computer Science and Engineering Technology programs serving first-generation students

ai_readiness.notes: Urban university serving diverse Houston population.

institutions.name: University of Puerto Rico at Mayagüez
institutions.carnegie_classification: R2: Doctoral Universities – High Research Activity
ai_highlights: Premier engineering school in the Caribbean with strong STEM research tradition
CAHSI founding member with decades of computing excellence
Active in NSF-funded research across AI, robotics, and data science

ai_readiness.notes: Premier engineering school in the Caribbean. Strong STEM tradition.

institutions.name: University of California, San Diego
institutions.carnegie_classification: R1: Doctoral Universities – Very High Research Activity
ai_highlights: Leads the TeachCSwithAI Consortium developing GenAI pedagogy nationwide
Halicioglu Data Science Institute pioneering undergraduate data science education
Comprehensive GenAI guidelines covering teaching, research, and administration

ai_readiness.notes: Drives the TeachCSwithAI Consortium. Pioneering GenAI in CS education.

institutions.name: San Francisco State University
institutions.carnegie_classification: Master's Colleges & Universities: Larger Programs
ai_highlights: Bay Area location provides strong tech industry connections for AI education
College of Science & Engineering growing AI-focused computing programs
Active CAHSI member supporting diversity in computing

ai_readiness.notes: Active CAHSI member in Bay Area. Growing computing programs.

institutions.name: Northeastern Illinois University
institutions.carnegie_classification: Master's Colleges & Universities: Medium Programs
ai_highlights: Chicago-area HSI expanding access to computing education
Growing CS program with focus on serving underrepresented students

ai_readiness.notes: Chicago-area HSI with growing CS program. CAHSI member.

institutions.name: The University of Texas at San Antonio
institutions.carnegie_classification: R1: Doctoral Universities – Very High Research Activity
ai_highlights: National Security Collaboration Center applies AI to cybersecurity research
School of Data Science launched with focus on ethical AI applications
Provost-level AI initiative establishing institution-wide AI strategy

ai_readiness.notes: Known for cybersecurity research excellence. Strong AI programs.

institutions.name: The University of Texas Rio Grande Valley
institutions.carnegie_classification: R2: Doctoral Universities – High Research Activity
ai_highlights: Largest HSI in Texas by Hispanic enrollment percentage (91%)
College of Engineering and Computer Science expanding AI curriculum
Developing AI applications for border region healthcare and agriculture

key_programs.name: College of Engineering and Computer Science

ai_readiness.notes: Largest HSI in Texas by Hispanic enrollment percentage. Growing research programs.

initiatives: College of Engineering and Computer Science

institutions.name: Arizona State University
institutions.carnegie_classification: R1: Doctoral Universities – Very High Research Activity

key_programs.name: School of Computing and Augmented Intelligence

ai_readiness.notes: Largest public university. Innovating in online education and AI integration.

initiatives: School of Computing and Augmented Intelligence

institutions.name: University of New Mexico

ai_readiness.notes: Flagship state university with strong research partnerships with national labs.

institutions.name: University of Houston

initiatives: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Data Science Institute

institutions.name: City College of New York (CUNY)

institutions.name: University of Illinois Chicago
institutions.carnegie_classification: R1: Doctoral Universities – Very High Research Activity

Serving one of the most diverse student bodies in the Midwest

ai_readiness.notes: Major urban research university with strong AI and data science programs.

institutions.name: Rutgers University-Newark
institutions.carnegie_classification: R2: Doctoral Universities – High Research Activity

initiatives: College of Engineering and Computer Science

institutions.name: Georgia State University

initiatives: College of Engineering, Design and Computing

institutions.name: Maricopa Community Colleges District

institutions.name: Austin Community College
institutions.carnegie_classification: Associate's Colleges: High Transfer-Mixed Traditional/Nontraditional
